name_en: 🆕 【Top Grade Original】M25594 Zipper 👏👏 This season's exclusive dreamy beige 'Gypsy Wallet' adds a fresh impression to the classic design as a Louis Vuitton iconic wallet. It features a single-piece non-inserted leather symbolizing the estate, paired with an elegant round zipper closure in classic bright gold. Dimensions: 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm
